Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a discussion thread created by a user

id.description: Unique identifier of the conversation matching the document ID

userId.description: The Google User UUID who owns this conversation

title.description: User visible title of the thread

systemInstruction.description: The system behavior directive injected in Gemini calls

useSearch.description: Whether Google Search grounding is enabled for this thread

modelName.description: Active model alias being queried in the chat

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single text message belonging to a discussion thread

role.description: The role who emitted the message

parts.description: The raw markdown content of the message

/conversations/{conversationId}.description: Chat conversations collection owned by authenticated users

/conversations/{conversationId}/messages.description: Sub-collection of messages associated with a conversation
